Name: Cassandra
Desc:
Apache Cassandra distributed NoSQL database deployed via the K8ssandra operator (cass-operator). Provides a multi-node Cassandra cluster for testing distributed database bugs.

Source code: The full Cassandra Java source tree may be available inside this container at /opt/source (read-write). If present, you can inspect Java source files to find the root cause of bugs — look especially in src/java/org/apache/cassandra/. You can also modify source files and rebuild Cassandra to apply a fix: run 'ant jar -Duse.jdk11=true' inside /opt/source to recompile, then rebuild and redeploy the Docker image with the patched JAR.
Supported Operations: Lightweight transactions (IF NOT EXISTS / IF conditions)
Source code inspection at /opt/source (Java source tree, if mounted)
Source code modification and Cassandra rebuild via 'ant jar -Duse.jdk11=true' in /opt/source
